nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.task_description: Add automation-first bias to verify-work and execute-phase workflows — default to Playwright/agent-browser for UAT instead of asking user to manually test
nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.approach: Add automation-first bias to verify-work and execute-phase workflows by defaulting to Playwright/agent-browser for UAT with fallback to human interaction only when automation is unavailable or subjective judgment is required.
out_of_scope: Implementing new Playwright testing patterns or framework changes
Creating comprehensive end-to-end test suites for all workflows
Replacing manual user acceptance testing for subjective UI/UX validation
Adding Playwright infrastructure or CI/CD pipeline integration
nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.risk_reason: Changes to 2+ workflow files with potential impact on verification phase behavior
